triplets.anchor: How do I cache API responses?
triplets.positive: Storing API results avoids repeated network calls.
triplets.negative: How do I cache flour for baking bread?

triplets.negative: Best way to sort laundry by colour

triplets.positive: The notebook's charge runs down quickly.

triplets.anchor: Explain how indexing improves database reads.
triplets.positive: An index lets the engine skip a full table scan.
triplets.negative: Explain how indexing improves a book's usability.

triplets.anchor: How to handle a 429 rate-limit response?
triplets.positive: Back off and retry when the API throttles you.
triplets.negative: How to handle a rude customer at the counter?

triplets.anchor: What causes memory leaks in long-running services?
triplets.positive: Unreleased references keep heap memory from being freed.
triplets.negative: What causes water leaks in old plumbing?

triplets.anchor: Convert a JSON string to an object.
triplets.positive: Parse the JSON text into a structured value.

triplets.anchor: The model overfits on the training set.
triplets.positive: It memorises training data and generalises poorly.
triplets.negative: The tailor overfits the suit to the mannequin.

triplets.anchor: Schedule a recurring task every night.
triplets.positive: Run the job automatically on a nightly cron.
triplets.negative: Schedule a dentist appointment for next night out.

triplets.positive: Use lossless encoding to shrink files safely.
triplets.negative: Compress a spring without losing tension.

triplets.positive: Verify identity using a bearer credential.
triplets.negative: Authenticate a painting as a genuine original.

triplets.anchor: Why is my SQL query so slow?
triplets.positive: The query lacks an index and scans every row.
triplets.negative: Why is my morning jog so slow lately?

triplets.anchor: Roll back the migration after an error.
triplets.positive: Revert the schema change when it fails.
triplets.negative: Roll back the carpet after the party.

triplets.anchor: Stream large files to avoid loading them in memory.
triplets.positive: Process the file in chunks instead of all at once.
triplets.negative: Stream the concert live to fans at home.

triplets.anchor: Set up retries for flaky network calls.
triplets.positive: Automatically re-attempt requests that time out.
